title: > Please identify:
content:
> Please identify:
> * Hidden Assumptions: What is the author taking for granted that the audience might not agree with?
> * Cultural/Contextual Blind Spots: Is the content biased toward a specific demographic or level of expertise?
> * The "Curse of Knowledge": Are there unexplained concepts that will alienate a layperson?
> * Mitigation: Suggest a specific "fix" for each identified blind spot.
> Content to Audit:
> [INSERT CONTENT HERE]
>
Step 7: Recognition of Shatter Points
Purpose: Pinpoint vulnerabilities or potential breaking points.
> Prompt:
> Act as a "Red Team" Stress Tester. Your task is to identify "Shatter Points." These are not minor errors; these are critical vulnerabilities that, if attacked, would cause the entire argument or plan to fail.
> You must:
> * Identify the Achilles Heel: What is the single weakest link in this content?
> * Simulate an Attack: Write a short paragraph attacking this specific point as a harsh critic would.
> * Reinforcement Plan: Provide a specific counter-argument or structural change to "armor" this shatter point so it cannot be broken.
